task_completion.description: FreeCAD application is opened and a new document is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is visible with a new, empty workspace or active document.

task_completion.description: A rectangular base plate is sketched with dimensions 200 mm x 100 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D sketch of a rectangle is visible, ideally showing dimension constraints of 200 mm (length) and 100 mm (width), centered on the origin.

task_completion.description: The base plate sketch is padded (extruded) to a thickness of 8 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D rectangular solid is visible. The Pad parameters or properties panel should show a length/thickness of 8 mm.

task_completion.description: A 4x2 grid of 8 holes is sketched or patterned with correct spacing and diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketch or hole feature showing 8 circles in a 2-row by 4-column grid. Visual constraints or properties should indicate a 5.5 mm diameter (2.75 mm radius) and symmetric spacing (X: ±20, ±60; Y: ±30).

task_completion.description: The 8 holes are cut completely through the base plate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model shows 8 distinct holes going all the way through the 8 mm thick plate (e.g., using a Pocket or Hole feature set to 'Through All').

task_completion.description: The completed model is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar, tree view, or a save dialog shows the filename 'mounting_plate.FCStd'. The save location should be visible as '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent progressively builds the model step-by-step.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like sketching, padding, and pocketing, rather than a finished file suddenly appearing.

integrity.description: The agent interacts with the FreeCAD application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD GUI (or its built-in Python console) is actively used. The agent does not simply mock the file creation using a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent does not open or rename a pre-existing solution file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is created from scratch (e.g., starting with 'Unnamed' or a new sketch) rather than opening an already completed 'mounting_plate.FCStd'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The mounting plate must be 200x100x8 mm. It must have exactly 8 holes in a 4x2 grid. The holes must be 5.5 mm in diameter (2.75 mm radius). The hole centers must be at X = [-60, -20, 20, 60] and Y = [-30, 30], symmetric about the origin. The final file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/mounting_plate.FCStd.
